data.name: Home.Hero.Subtitle
data.value: The Google Sheet that helps you manage your investment portfolio

data.name: Home.S1.Body
data.value:
Stacking stocks, real estate, options or ETFs in your portfolio makes no sense.
Each purchase should match a clear strategy that you have defined and formalized.
Portfolio Arbiter lets you split your capital into strategies in which you place your allocations and positions according to your investment choices.
It then becomes possible to hold the same instrument across several strategies, with different entry and exit rules. At your broker, you only see one line, while there are several in the strategy view.

data.name: Home.S2.Body
data.value:
A position represents the asset you hold; it is the result of all your transactions on that security.
You get a condensed view of the position, including the impact of the exchange rate since your first transaction.
Example: a purchase in dollars has affected your margin by 715 CHF.

data.name: Home.S3.Sub1.Body
data.value:
Group your holdings by strategies and analyze your returns with precision.
This organization makes sense because it reflects your investments sorted by the strategies and allocations you have created.

data.name: Home.S3.Sub2.Title
data.value: Each strategy has its own cash

data.name: Home.S3.Sub2.Body
data.value: Each transaction increases or decreases the corresponding balance. The real value of a strategy equals your investments plus the associated cash.

data.name: Home.S3.Sub3.Title
data.value: Everything is automatically converted to your reference currency

data.name: Home.S3.Sub3.Body
data.value: Everything is automatically converted into your reference currency to make comparison and analysis easier.

data.name: Home.S4.Body
data.value:
A position aggregates every transaction tied to a security in the chosen strategy.
You can combine stocks, options, dividends, interest, etc.
The purchase price is dynamically recalculated on each transaction.
So a dividend or a covered call sale automatically reduces your acquisition price.

data.name: Home.S5.Body
data.value:
Your broker gives a biased return: it only averages the performance of your positions, without factoring in FX variations or the reality of capital deployed.
Dormant or unused capital is ignored, which actually lowers your real return.
Compare your returns by currency and measure the impact of exchange rates on your portfolio.
Unlike your broker, Portfolio Arbiter converts each transaction at the rate in effect on the day it happened, not just your profits in your reference currency.
Since you allocate a precise share of your capital to each strategy, you can compute the exact return of every one of them.

data.name: Home.S6.Body
data.value:
Portfolio Arbiter lets you define target allocations for your strategies, allocations and positions.
The rebalancing page automatically computes the amounts to buy or sell to restore the desired balance.
All amounts are converted into your reference currency for perfect consistency.
Execute the buy or sell operations for each line, then record the completed transactions. Do this for every line and, in the end, your portfolio is fully rebalanced.
In practice, rebalancing is typically done one to four times per year.

data.name: Legal.Intro
data.value: General terms, privacy policy and legal notice for Portfolio Arbiter (Reality Explorer Sàrl).

data.name: Legal.Terms.Heading
data.value: General Terms of Sale and Use (T&Cs)

data.name: Legal.Terms.S1.Body
data.value: These terms govern the contractual relationship between Reality Explorer Sàrl (hereinafter "RE"), with registered office in Givisiez (Switzerland), and any individual or legal entity (hereinafter "the Client") wishing to acquire products or services through the PortfolioArbiter.com website.

data.name: Legal.Terms.S2.Title
data.value: 2. License to use the Google Sheets files

data.name: Legal.Terms.S2.Body
data.value:
RE provides the Client with proprietary management tools hosted on the Google Sheets platform.
Private license: RE grants the Client a personal, non-exclusive and non-transferable license of use.
Strict restrictions: The Client is authorized to use these sheets only for their own account. Distributing, reselling, sublicensing, publicly sharing or modifying these documents on behalf of third parties is strictly forbidden.
Sanctions and penalty clause: Any breach of this clause or any attempt to circumvent access restrictions will trigger the immediate, definitive and automatic revocation of all Client accesses, without notice or formal demand, and without any right to a refund. Furthermore, the offender will immediately owe, as of right, a flat and irreducible penalty of CHF 50,000 (fifty thousand Swiss francs) per recorded infringement, as a penalty clause. RE will initiate immediate legal proceedings before the competent courts for violation of the Swiss Federal Copyright Act (LDA) and will demand full compensation for the commercial, technical and moral damage suffered.

data.name: Legal.Terms.S3.Body
data.value:
RE offers paid courses explaining the technical use of the tools and presenting financial strategy methods.
Warning: These courses are strictly educational. RE does not provide personalized investment advice. The Client is solely responsible for their financial decisions and the risks taken on the markets.
Liability: RE cannot be held liable for financial losses resulting from the application of the strategies taught or the use of the spreadsheets.

data.name: Legal.Terms.S4.Body
data.value: Prices are shown inclusive of all taxes on the website. Payment is due immediately upon order. For recurring access, the charge is automatic at each period. The Client may cancel their subscription up to 5 days before the renewal date.

data.name: Legal.Terms.S5.Body
data.value: In accordance with the legislation on digital content, the Client acknowledges that by accessing the Google Sheets files or the course modules, they benefit from immediate execution of the service and expressly waive their right of withdrawal. No refund will be made after the access has been delivered.

data.name: Legal.Terms.S6.Body
data.value: All structures, formulas, scripts and educational content remain the exclusive property of RE. No property right is transferred to the Client; only a license of use is granted.

data.name: Legal.Terms.S7.Body
data.value: RE cannot be held liable for indirect damages or financial losses related to the use of the products. RE does not guarantee the permanent availability of third-party services (Google Cloud/Sheets) required for the tools to function.

data.name: Legal.Terms.S8.Body
data.value: In the event of bankruptcy or cessation of activity of RE, service obligations cease immediately. The Client accepts the risk inherent to the continuity of a digital service and waives any claim for compensation in the event of permanent shutdown of the platforms.

data.name: Legal.Terms.S9.Body
data.value: These T&Cs are governed by Swiss law. Any dispute relating to their execution falls within the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the city of Fribourg.

data.name: Legal.Privacy.Intro
data.value: The protection of your personal data is a priority for Reality Explorer Sàrl. This policy details how we process your information on the PortfolioArbiter.com website.

data.name: Legal.Privacy.S1.Body
data.value:
To access the services, downloads of the Google Sheets files and the courses, registering a user account is mandatory. We collect on this occasion:
• Your first and last name. • Your email address (to send access information and for communication). • Your billing information (via our secure payment providers).

data.name: Legal.Privacy.S2.Body
data.value:
Your data is used exclusively to:
• Manage your account and your access to the digital tools. • Provide course and coaching follow-up. • Respond to your customer support requests. • Comply with our legal and accounting obligations in Switzerland.

data.name: Legal.Privacy.S3.Body
data.value:
Your data is never sold to third parties. It is only shared with the providers strictly necessary for the operation of the service:
• Google Cloud/Drive: for hosting and using the Google Sheets files. • Stripe/Banks: for securing payments. • Infomaniak: for hosting the website and the emails.

data.name: Legal.Privacy.S4.Body
data.value: The site uses essential technical cookies to keep your session active and ensure the security of your member area. By using the site, you accept the use of these cookies necessary for the service.

data.name: Legal.Privacy.S5.Body
data.value: We implement technical security measures to protect your information against any unauthorized access. However, the Client acknowledges that the transmission of data over the Internet involves intrinsic risks.

data.name: Legal.Privacy.S6.Body
data.value: In accordance with the Swiss Federal Data Protection Act (LPD) and the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your personal data. You can exercise these rights by contacting us directly at the support email address.

data.name: Legal.Privacy.S7.Body
data.value: Data linked to your account is kept for as long as your license or subscription is active. Accounting data is kept for the legal period of 10 years required by Swiss law.

data.name: Legal.LegalNotice.S1.Body
data.value:
The PortfolioArbiter.com website is published by:
Reality Explorer Sàrl Rue Robert-Stalder 15 1762 Givisiez Switzerland
Swiss business identification number (IDE): CHE-406.920.591

data.name: Legal.LegalNotice.S2.Body
data.value: The person responsible for publication and content is Mr. Grillet.

data.name: Legal.LegalNotice.S3.Body
data.value:
The site is hosted by:
Infomaniak Network SA Rue Eugène-Marziano 25 1227 Les Acacias, Geneva Switzerland

data.name: Legal.LegalNotice.S4.Body
data.value: All content (text, logos, calculation structures, videos) present on this site is the exclusive property of Reality Explorer Sàrl. Any unauthorized reproduction or distribution is strictly forbidden.

data.name: Auth.LoginSubtitle
data.value: Sign in to access Portfolio Arbiter

data.name: Register.Subtitle
data.value: Fill in the form to create your account.

data.name: Register.SuccessMessage
data.value: A confirmation email has been sent to your address. Check your inbox.

data.name: Register.EmailTaken
data.value: This email address is already in use.

data.name: Register.AlreadyHaveAccount
data.value: Already have an account? Sign in

data.name: ConfirmEmail.Success
data.value: Your email address has been confirmed. You can now sign in.

data.name: ConfirmEmail.InvalidToken
data.value: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Please sign up again.

data.name: AccessDenied.Body
data.value: This page is reserved for clients who have purchased a course.

data.name: ChangePassword.Subtitle
data.value: Enter your current password then choose a new one.

data.name: ChangePassword.Mismatch
data.value: The two new passwords do not match.

data.name: ChangePassword.TooShort
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters.

data.name: Contact.Subtitle
data.value: Have a question? Send us a message, we'll be glad to answer.

data.name: Contact.Success
data.value: Thank you! Your message has been sent.

data.name: Contact.Error
data.value: An error occurred while sending. Please try again later.

data.name: Contact.InvalidEmail
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: Catalog.Empty
data.value: No training available yet, but send us a request and we'll get back to you.
